blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this learning path! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned about the value of Grafana IRM for incident response and on-call management
- Built a mental model of IRM components and workflows
- Created an on-call schedule with a rotation layer
- Created an escalation chain that routes alerts to the current on-call responder
- Connected Grafana Alerting as an integration and linked it to your escalation chain
- Connected an alert rule to IRM using contact points
- Tested your IRM configuration from alert generation to acknowledgment

You've completed the foundational setup for Grafana IRM. This basic configuration demonstrates how IRM routes alerts through escalation chains and schedules, but there's much more you can do to customize IRM for your team's needs. Consider setting up additional schedules, configuring more notification channels, or connecting additional alert rules to expand your incident response coverage.

---

### More to explore (optional)

The world is your oyster! Read more about how you can:

- [Configure notification rules](/docs/grafana-cloud/alerting-and-irm/irm/manage/notifications/notification-rules/)
- [Install the Grafana IRM mobile app](/docs/grafana-cloud/alerting-and-irm/irm/mobile-app/)
- [Sync Grafana IRM contacts to your phone](/docs/grafana-cloud/alerting-and-irm/irm/manage/notifications/phone-and-sms/#sync-irm-phone-numbers-to-your-contacts)
- [Configure IRM as code](/docs/grafana-cloud/alerting-and-irm/irm/set-up/infra-as-code/)
- [Connect your Slack workspace](/docs/grafana-cloud/alerting-and-irm/irm/configure/integrations/irm-slack/)
- [Manage incidents with Grafana IRM](/docs/grafana-cloud/alerting-and-irm/irm/use/incident-management/)

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths to build on what you learned:

- [Create infrastructure alerts in Grafana Cloud](/docs/learning-paths/infrastructure-alerting/)
